metadata.description: Name of the hive deployment
Azure region for all resources — always pass explicitly to ensure single-region deployment
Total number of agents to deploy
Max agents per Container App (default: 5)
Container image to deploy (e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/amplihive:latest)
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Anthropic API key for Claude SDK agents

agentPromptBase.defaultValue: You are a distributed hive mind agent.

metadata.description: Agent system prompt base (agent index appended)
Memory transport type
Memory backend type
LLM model for agents (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6)
Whether Azure agents should perform distributed hive retrieval during question answering
Max shards to query per distributed retrieval request (0 = all deployed agents)
Timeout in seconds for remote shard queries (0 = no timeout)
Deployment profile label propagated to agents and harnesses
Whether to enable OpenTelemetry inside deployed agents
OTLP collector endpoint for agent spans
OTLP protocol for agent telemetry export
Optional OTLP exporter headers
OTel service namespace propagated to agents
Emit spans to stdout when no OTLP endpoint is configured

configuration.secrets: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'acr-password', 'value', if(empty(parameters('acrName')), listCredentials(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', variables('acrNameResolved')), '2023-07-01'), listCredentials(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', parameters('acrName')), '2023-07-01')).passwords[0].value), createObject('name', 'anthropic-api-key', 'value', parameters('anthropicApiKey')), createObject('name', 'eh-connection-string', 'value', listKeys(format('{0}/AuthorizationRules/RootManageSharedAccessKey', resourceId('Microsoft.EventHub/namespaces', variables('ehNamespaceName'))), '2023-01-01-preview').primaryConnectionString)), variables('otelSecrets'))]

input.name: [format('agent-{0}', add(mul(range(0, variables('appCount'))[copyIndex()], parameters('agentsPerApp')), range(0, min(parameters('agentsPerApp'), sub(parameters('agentCount'), mul(range(0, variables('appCount'))[copyIndex()], parameters('agentsPerApp')))))[copyIndex('containers')]))]

min(parameters('agentsPerApp'), sub(parameters('agentCount'), mul(range(0, variables('appCount'))[copyIndex()], parameters('agentsPerApp')))))[copyIndex('containers')]))), createObject('name',
